---
title: "Lab 4"
author: "Your name here!!!"
subtitle: "BSTA 513/613"
date-modified: "today"
categories: [""]
format: 
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
    toc: true
    self-contained: true
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute:
  freeze: auto  # re-render only when source changes
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

# PLEASE DO NOT REMOVE THIS CODE CHUNK!!!
### ADD YOUR LIBRARIES HERE!!! ####

library(tidyverse)
library(gtsummary)
library(here)
```

## Directions

This is your **editing** file. **Please do not remove anything from this editing file!!** You will only add your code and work to this file.

## Lab activities

::: callout-note
I have left it up to you to load the needed packages for this lab.
:::

### Restate research question

In this study, we will investigate the association between food insecurity and ________. 

### Build your model


### Assess your model fit


### Perform model diagnostics
